title: Add Timeline duration in MONTHS not days
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I’d like to create a timeline (to see a due date) that does not work with days but with calendar months. E.g. Starting date 1 January 2024, duration 9 months instead of days. 
Tks, 
Neil

posts.author: neilfalzon (Neil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I’d like to create a timeline (to see a due date) that does not work with days but with calendar months. E.g. Starting date 1 January 2024, duration 9 months instead of days.

Tks,
Neil
